title: TBench numeric tolerance output
prompt: FAKE_TBENCH_VIDEO_FRAME: write a takeoff-frame estimate inside the verifier tolerance.

commandChecks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
frame = int(open('takeoff-frame.txt').read())
assert 219 <= frame <= 223, frame
PY

constraints: near-miss numeric tasks need verifier-style tolerance checks
the final artifact must be checked, not only an intermediate calculation
